title: packera pauciflora
intro: Packera pauciflora, also known as eastern yarrow or green-headed aster, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Packera pauciflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in herbal infusions to promote wound healing and soothe digestive issues.
